title: Meme Culture React
description: Meme reaction format for social media. Zoom effects, bold text, irreverent tone. Quick punchy cuts with text overlays.
prompt: Start with a reaction trigger. Build with zoom-ins and bold text overlays. Hit the punchline hard. Use meme formatting — Impact font, white outlines, dramatic zooms.
cut_style: Tonal montage. Emotional contrast between scenes. Zoom cuts for emphasis. Text should feel like meme captions.
